summary: Iteration 23: Tested unified codebase after symlink migration. All backend APIs working (15/15 tests passed). Fixed critical bug in WebsiteAdminPage.jsx that caused runtime error 'Cannot read properties of null (reading salon_name)'. Root cause: page was using raw axios instead of api instance with auth interceptor, causing 403 errors.

bugs_fixed.issue: Runtime error: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'salon_name')
bugs_fixed.root_cause: Page was importing raw 'axios' instead of 'api' instance from '../lib/api.js'. The api instance has auth interceptor that adds Bearer token. Without it, /api/website/config returned 403 Forbidden, config remained null, and accessing config.salon_name crashed.
bugs_fixed.fix: 1. Changed import from 'axios' to 'api' from '../lib/api.js'. 2. Updated all API calls to use relative paths (api.get('/website/config') instead of axios.get(`${API}/website/config`)). 3. Added null check for config to show graceful error message instead of crash.

critical_code_review_comments: WebsiteAdminPage.jsx was using raw axios without auth interceptor - FIXED
Other admin pages should be checked to ensure they use the api instance from lib/api.js
The unified codebase (symlinks) is working correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 23 verified unified codebase working. Fixed WebsiteAdminPage.jsx auth bug. All features tested: public website, booking form with categories/cards/promos, admin login, Planning, Settimana (7 days), Gestione Sito. Backend APIs all working. Card templates (6) and promos (7) display correctly in booking form.
